title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system for legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. The platform is built with Claude and represents a shift from incremental improvements to significant capability advances in legal technology.
